You are working on the pinterest/ktlint repository.
The codebase is at version 0.50 (commit: ce93a6db).

## Issue to Resolve

No spacing around colon in annotation
Spacing should not be allowed around the colon in annotation and annotation entries regardless of the annotation target

```
@file:JvmName("Foo") // allowed
@file :JvmName("Foo") // disallowed
@file: JvmName("Foo") // disallowed
@file : JvmName("Foo") // disallowed

@set:[Inject VisibleForTesting] // allowed
@set :[Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
@set: [Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
@set : [Inject VisibleForTesting] // disallowed
```

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/SpacingAroundColonRule.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

content.text:
I have resolved the issue where spacing was allowed around colons in annotations and annotation entries.

### Changes made:

- Modified `SpacingAroundColonRule.kt` to remove the early return for colons that are part of an annotation or annotation entry.
- Implemented specific logic to enforce no spacing (including newlines) around colons when they are direct children of an `ANNOTATION` or `ANNOTATION_ENTRY` element.
- The rule now correctly identifies and removes:
    - Spacing before the colon (e.g., `@file : JvmName`).
    - Spacing after the colon (e.g., `@file: JvmName`).
    - Newlines around the colon.
    - Combined spacing/newlines around the colon (emitting an "Unexpected spacing around ':'" violation).
- Added a new test file `SpacingAroundColonAnnotationRuleTest.kt` with comprehensive test cases covering use-site targets like `@file`, `@set`, and combinations of spacing, newlines, and comments.

### Verification:

- Ran the newly created tests in `SpacingAroundColonAnnotationRuleTest.kt`, all of which passed.
- Ran existing tests in `SpacingAroundColonRuleTest.kt` to ensure no regressions were introduced, and they also passed.

These changes ensure that ktlint now correctly enforces the "no spacing around colon" rule for all types of annotations in accordance with the requested behavior.
